hero.sub: We sell natural wood — boards, beams, live edge. Oak, walnut, beech, maple and more, directly from us.

home.woodSub: Kiln dried, certified wood directly from us. Oak, walnut, beech and other species.
home.woodCtaSub: Filter by species, thickness and finish. All in stock, available immediately.
home.furnitureSub: Besides wood, we also make furniture. Every piece by hand, from material you choose.
home.aboutTitle:
A craft passed down
through generations
home.aboutP1: BeliWood was born from a love of wood and traditional craftsmanship. Every product passes through the hands of skilled carpenters who respect the natural quality of the material.
home.aboutP2: We use no cheap substitutes — only solid wood, natural oils and waxes. The result is furniture that ages beautifully and lasts for generations.

products.title: Our products
products.sub: Every piece handcrafted with love for wood and craftsmanship.

wood.title: Wood for sale
wood.sub: Solid boards and beams from stock. Oak, walnut, beech and other species — dried and fresh, in various dimensions.

detail.delivery: Delivery across Slovakia · Custom dimensions on request

kolekcia.title:
Handcrafted
from our wood
kolekcia.sub: Every piece was made right in our workshop — from the wood we dry and sell ourselves. Craftsmanship visible in every detail.

success.title: Thank you!
success.sub: Your order has been successfully sent. We will contact you soon to arrange delivery details.
success.email: Check your email inbox — you will receive an order confirmation within a few minutes.

footer.tagline: Handcrafted wooden furniture and accessories with emphasis on material quality and craftsmanship.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how BeliWood processes personal data of customers in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (GDPR).
privacy.s1p:
[NAME / BUSINESS NAME]
[ADDRESS]
Email: info@beliwood.sk

Note: Controller details will be added upon business registration.
privacy.s2p: When you place an order, we collect the following data:
privacy.s2list: First and last name|Email address|Phone number (optional)|Delivery address (street, city, postal code)|Order note (optional)
privacy.s3p:
We process your personal data solely for the purpose of fulfilling your order, communicating with you, and complying with legal obligations.

The legal basis for processing is the performance of a contract pursuant to Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. Where required by law, we also process data on the basis of a legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR).
privacy.s4p: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil your order and comply with legal obligations. Accounting and tax records containing personal data are retained for 10 years in accordance with applicable legislation.
privacy.s5p: Your data may be shared with the following processors with whom we have concluded data processing agreements:
privacy.s5list: Vercel Inc. – hosting provider and cloud data storage (USA; transfer secured by Standard Contractual Clauses)|Resend Inc. – transactional email service (USA; transfer secured by Standard Contractual Clauses)
privacy.s5end: We do not share your personal data with third parties for marketing or other commercial purposes.
privacy.s6p: As a data subject, you have the right:
privacy.s6list: To access your personal data (Art. 15 GDPR)|To rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data (Art. 16 GDPR)|To erasure (Art. 17 GDPR)|To restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)|To data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)|To object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)|To lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority
privacy.s6end: To exercise your rights, please contact us at: info@beliwood.sk
privacy.s7p: This website uses only technically necessary cookies required for the website to function properly (e.g. shopping cart contents). We do not use tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies from third parties. Your consent to cookies is not required for the operation of this site.
privacy.s8p: We may occasionally update this policy in connection with changes to how we process data or applicable legislation. The current version is always available on this page.
